sentence: 天气好的时候，我喜欢骑车上班。
pinyin: Tiānqì hǎo de shíhou, wǒ xǐhuān qíchē shàngbān.
english: When the weather is nice, I like to ride my bike to work.

sentence: 爷爷每天晚饭喝一小杯白酒。
pinyin: Yéye měitiān wǎnfàn hē yī xiǎo bēi báijiǔ.
english: Grandpa drinks a small glass of baijiu with dinner every day.

sentence: 他从小就有成为科学家的抱负。
pinyin: Tā cóngxiǎo jiù yǒu chéngwéi kēxuéjiā de bàofù.
english: He has had the ambition to become a scientist since he was young.

sentence: 这次考试的试题比上次难多了。
pinyin: Zhè cì kǎoshì de shì tí bǐ shàng cì nán duō le.
english: The exam questions this time were much harder than last time.

meaning: 1. place to return to; 2. home; 3. final destination; 4. ending
sentence: 她觉得家才是自己真正的归宿。
pinyin: Tā juéde jiā cái shì zìjǐ zhēnzhèng de guīsù.
english: She feels that home is her true place of belonging.
